Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Blackflame madra can billow out as black fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Blackflame madra is a type of madra that can ravage the mind and body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Blackflame madra has caused damage to Orthos's spirit over centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Blackflame madra is difficult to Forge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Blackflame madra can behave like a hungry beast when focused.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — When used, the Fierce Fire Robe technique shrouds the user in Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The aura produced by the Fierce Fire Robe technique is a thin haze of black and red fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon used Blackflame madra to ignite tinder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon uses a pulse of Blackflame madra to blow apart a soldier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Blackflame madra can cause damage to a user's madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Blackflame madra can be moved by feel without relying on convoluted patterns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Blackflame madra is a type of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Blackflame madra can be sprayed from Orthos' mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon can spray Blackflame madra.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon cycles Blackflame madra to fight the chill of the wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos can flare Blackflame madra from his shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Path of Black Flame makes Lindon aggressive and impulsive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon uses Blackflame madra to prevent being burned by Orthos' shell.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon has a Blackflame core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon launched a pulse of Blackflame madra.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon uses Blackflame madra to warm himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin sensed something that might have been Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon fears Blackflame madra could scorch his soul.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon can pull Blackflame madra from his core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Naian is a victim of Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses Blackflame madra as an unfocused barrier for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses Blackflame madra to mold aura.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon's Blackflame madra feels angry and aggressive.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon uses a finger of Blackflame madra to cut through an indentation in space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon wove threads of pure madra and Blackflame madra together.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod used a Forged claw of Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — An explosion of Blackflame madra occurred near Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Blackflame madra is used in combat.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Blackflame madra is used by Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Blackflame madra splashed against the barrier around Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos uses Blackflame madra to forge claws.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
